rulings.Case Title: ANDY KILDAY EVENT PRODUCTION SERVICES, INC. VS. SAN FRANCISCO MARTIME NATIONAL PARK ASSOCIATION, A et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorneys' Fees
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 31, 2010, line 3, DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO MARTIME NATIONAL PARK ASSOCIATION'S Motion For Attorneys' Fees. DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S VOLUNTARY DISMISSAL RESULTS IN NO PREVAILING PARTY FOR FEE PURPOSES. CC SECTION 1717(b)(2). REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN BAD FAITH AND AWARDING SANCTIONS UNDER CCP SECTION 128.7 WOULD BE INCONSISTENT WITH THE STATUTE'S SAFE HARBOR PROVISIONS. =(302/CWW)
